title: PWA Manifest, App Icons, and Half-Day Color Indicator Fixes

requirements.text: Update `frontend/index.html` to include a full PWA manifest link (`<link rel='manifest' href='/manifest.json'>`), theme-color meta tag matching the app's amber/charcoal palette, Apple mobile web app meta tags (`apple-mobile-web-app-capable`, `apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style`, `apple-mobile-web-app-title`), and Apple touch icon links for common iOS sizes (180×180, 152×152, 120×120).

quotes: PWA manifest and app icons to make SwipeTrack Pro Play Store-ready
splash screen/theme-color meta tags in index.html

acceptanceCriteria: theme-color meta tag is present with the amber/charcoal app color
apple-mobile-web-app-capable and apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style meta tags are present
Apple touch icon links pointing to generated icon assets are present

requirements.text: Create `frontend/public/manifest.json` as a fully PWA-compliant Web App Manifest with: `name: 'SwipeTrack Pro'`, `short_name: 'SwipeTrack'`, `description: 'Office attendance and working-hours tracker'`, `start_url: '/'`, `display: 'standalone'`, `orientation: 'portrait'`, `theme_color` and `background_color` matching the app's dark charcoal/amber palette, and an `icons` array covering sizes 48, 72, 96, 128, 144, 152, 192, 384, and 512 pixels — including at least one entry with `purpose: 'maskable'` for the 192×192 and 512×512 sizes pointing to generated icon assets in `frontend/public/assets/generated/`.

quotes: full manifest.json with proper name, theme, standalone display mode, orientation, start URL
full icon set (48px–512px including 192 and 512), maskable icons

acceptanceCriteria: All required manifest fields (name, short_name, start_url, display, theme_color, background_color) are present
Icons array covers all sizes from 48 to 512 including 192 and 512
Icon paths resolve to files that exist under `frontend/public/assets/generated/`

requirements.text: Add a service worker registration script to `frontend/index.html` (or `frontend/src/main.tsx` via a registration helper) that registers `/sw.js` if the browser supports service workers. Create a minimal `frontend/public/sw.js` that caches the app shell (index.html, main JS/CSS bundles) on install and serves them from cache when offline, ensuring the app meets the PWA installability criteria required by the Play Store via TWA.
acceptanceCriteria: Service worker is registered on app load without errors in the browser console
App shell resources are cached on first load
App loads from cache when network is unavailable
Chrome DevTools Application tab shows the service worker as active

requirements.text: Fix the green/red daily hours color indicator threshold logic throughout the app (`frontend/src/pages/DailyEntry.tsx`, `frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx` Today tab, and Dashboard Week day rows). For `halfDayFirstHalf` leave entries, use 4h 30m (270 minutes) as the green/red threshold instead of the full-day 8h 30m. For `halfDaySecondHalf` leave entries, use 4h 00m (240 minutes) as the threshold. For `noLeave` (regular working days), keep the existing 8h 30m threshold. Full-day leave entries must never show a red indicator regardless of hours. The surplus/shortfall appended value (e.g., '+0h 30m' or '−0h 40m') must also be computed relative to the correct per-leave-type threshold.

quotes: Fix the green/red color indicator logic for half-day leave days
For First-Half Leave days, use 4h 30m as the threshold
For Second-Half Leave days, use 4h 00m as the threshold
Do not compare half-day leave entries against the full-day target of 8h 30m

acceptanceCriteria: A halfDayFirstHalf entry with 3h 00m calculated hours displays in red with '−1h 30m' shortfall
A halfDayFirstHalf entry with 4h 30m or more displays in green with surplus relative to 4h 30m
A halfDaySecondHalf entry with 4h 00m or more displays in green with surplus relative to 4h 00m
A halfDaySecondHalf entry with 3h 50m displays in red with shortfall relative to 4h 00m
Full-day leave entries show no red indicator regardless of hours value
Regular working day (noLeave) still uses 8h 30m as threshold

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
All icon files must be placed under frontend/public/assets/generated/ and referenced from manifest.json and index.html accordingly
Service worker must not interfere with the existing Internet Identity authentication flow or the ICP agent calls
nonGoals: Publishing to the Google Play Store directly — that requires external tooling (PWABuilder / Bubblewrap)
Changing any hours calculation formula in hoursCalculation.ts beyond the color threshold fix

required: SwipeTrack Pro app icon — dark charcoal circle background with a stylised amber/gold clock-and-checkmark motif, clean flat design (swipetrack-icon.dim_512x512.png)
SwipeTrack Pro app icon — same design, maskable safe-zone version with extra padding (swipetrack-icon-maskable.dim_512x512.png)
SwipeTrack Pro app icon — small size variant, same design (swipetrack-icon-192.dim_192x192.png)
SwipeTrack Pro app icon — medium size variant, same design (swipetrack-icon-144.dim_144x144.png)
SwipeTrack Pro app icon — small size variants for manifest (swipetrack-icon-96.dim_96x96.png)
SwipeTrack Pro app icon — smallest manifest size (swipetrack-icon-48.dim_48x48.png)
SwipeTrack Pro Apple touch icon — rounded square, dark charcoal with amber motif (swipetrack-apple-touch-icon.dim_180x180.png)
